sentences.arabic: أَصِلُ إِلَى الْمَكْتَبِ فِي السَّاعَةِ الثَّامِنَةِ صَبَاحاً كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan dolazim u ured u osam sati ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: I arrive at the office at eight o'clock every morning.

sentences.arabic: أَقُومُ بِمُرَاجَعَةِ بَرِيدِي الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيِّ وَتَنْظِيمِ جَدْوَلِ أَعْمَالِي.
sentences.translation: Pregledam svoju e-poštu i organizujem svoj raspored rada.
sentences.translationEn: I check my email and organize my work schedule.

sentences.arabic: أَشْرَبُ الْقَهْوَةَ مَعَ زُمَلَائِي قَبْلَ بَدْءِ الِاجْتِمَاعِ الْأُسْبُوعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Pijem kafu sa kolegama prije početka sedmičnog sastanka.
sentences.translationEn: I drink coffee with my colleagues before starting the weekly meeting.
